calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Of Order
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Gonden (Counsel for Old First Presbyterian Church); Caroline Hinshaw (Counsel for Timothy Jones, Trustee).

After discussion concerning the order in which the matters on calendar would be heard, Mr. Gonden presented argument in support of the Petition to remove the trustee and appoint co-successor trustees which was rebutted by Ms. Hinshaw, particularly with respect to the proposed Order language concerning the current Trustee's use of Trust funds to pay statutory fees to himself and his counsel. The Petition was granted and the Order signed in open court as revised. In light of this action, the status hearing on the now former Trustee's compliance with previous Court orders was taken off calendar.

There then arose the issue as to whether bond would be required for the new successor co-trustees. Mr. Gonden expressed the view that the Church would probably waive bond but could not categorically affirm the same. The Court set the matter for status on April 2, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 by which date Mr. Gonden's client would either waive bond or appear to discuss the amount of the bond.

Finally, the Court granted Ms. Hinshaw's Motion to be relieved as counsel for Mr. Jones, signing the Order for same in open court.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Continued To Mar-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing as petitioner. David Gonden appearing for Old First Presbyterian Church. Mr. Gondon argued that without counsel for Mr. Jones, they have no way to communicate with him. Petition to remove trustee is set for hearing on 3/19. This motion is continued to 3/19. Court will grant Ms. Hinshaw's motion on 3/19.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Of Order
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Continued To Mar-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing for Timothy Jones. Mr. Gondon is not in court. Ms. Hinshaw has filed a motion to be relieved as counsel. Hearing date is set on 3/6. Accounting is not filed.. Matter is continued to 3/5 for compliance of order. Ms. Hinshaw will notify Mr. Gondon.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Omar deLeon.

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: David Gonden appearing for petitioner Old First Presbyterian Church. Caroline Hinshaw appearing for Timothy Jones. Ms. Hinshaw has not received an accounting from Mr. Jones. Petition is granted. Accounting to be filed by 2/5/07. Order signed as modified. Mr. Jones can not take any compensation without further court order.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appt Succ Trustees
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Caroline Hinshaw appearing for Tim Jones, trustee. David Gondon appearing for Old First Presbyterian Church. The trustee is having trouble getting the mail from the post office. He has transferred the house. He is working on filing the tax return and marshaling the other assets. Matter is denied. If the trustee has not done it by the anniversary date, Mr. Gondon can petition again. Ms. Hinshaw will prepare an order and send it to Mr. Gondon. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appt Succ Trustees
Off Calendar Apr-25-2006 Continued To Jun-13-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Stephen Taber appearing for Old First Presbyterian Church. Caroline Hinshaw appearing for Timothy Jones. The matter is continued to 6/13. Judge: John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722; Clerk: Alison Agbay
